summary: Phase 4 Event Summary Enhancement tested successfully. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All key UI features verified: dual action paths (To Athlete/To Pod), athlete grouping by priority, routing progress tracker, school engagement heatmap, and debrief completion.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: button nested inside button (open-pod-{id} inside athlete-card-toggle-{id})

action_items: Fix nested button warning in AthleteCard component (move 'open-pod' button outside the toggle button wrapper)
critical_code_review_comments: EventSummary.js correctly implements dual action paths with separate buttons for 'To Athlete' and 'To Pod'
Athlete grouping sorts by interest priority (hot first, then warm, cool, none)
Routing Progress bar correctly tracks actioned/pending notes with separate counts for routed and sent
School Heatmap displays color-coded bars (red=hot, amber=warm, blue=cool) with interaction counts
Debriefed badge appears when summaryStatus='complete', Complete Debrief button hidden appropriately
send-to-athlete endpoint correctly creates: support_thread + support_message + athlete_note (timeline) + notification
Minor HTML semantics issue: button element nested inside another button (lines 157-184 in EventSummary.js)
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing seed data. event_0 (Winter Showcase) has 6 notes, 3 athletes, 5 schools.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Event Summary enhancement fully tested. Event Summary page at /events/event_0/summary works with all new features: (1) Dual Action Paths - 'To Athlete' (violet) sends message to athlete, 'To Pod' (blue) routes to school pod, (2) Athlete Grouping - cards sorted by interest priority with hot athletes first, (3) Routing Progress Tracker - shows X/Y notes actioned with breakdown of routed vs sent, (4) School Engagement Heatmap - color-coded bars showing interaction counts by interest level, (5) Complete Debrief - marks event as complete, shows Debriefed badge. After actions, badges update from 'To Athlete'/'To Pod' to 'Sent'/'In Pod'. Toast notifications confirm actions. data-testid selectors: event-summary-page, routing-progress, athlete-card-{id}, summary-note-{id}, send-to-athlete-{id}, route-to-pod-{id}, sent-badge-{id}, routed-badge-{id}, school-heatmap, school-bar-{name}, complete-debrief-btn, debriefed-badge, action-paths-legend.

frontend_ui: Event Summary page loads with data-testid='event-summary-page' - PASS
Stats grid shows 6 notes, 5 schools, 3 athletes, 7 follow-ups - PASS
Debriefed badge visible (event already debriefed) - PASS
Complete Debrief button hidden (event already debriefed) - PASS
Routing Progress shows 2/6 actioned initially, updates after actions - PASS
3 athlete cards displayed (Lucas Rodriguez, Emma Chen, Marcus Johnson) - PASS
Athletes sorted by interest priority (Lucas with 2 hot first) - PASS
Dual action buttons: 'To Athlete' (violet) and 'To Pod' (blue) visible - PASS
Click 'To Athlete' → 'Sent' badge appears, progress updates - PASS
Click 'To Pod' → 'In Pod' badge appears, toast 'Routed to X Pod' - PASS
School Heatmap shows 5 schools with color-coded bars - PASS
Action Paths Legend visible with descriptions - PASS

verified_requirements.routing_progress_tracker: PASS - shows actioned/pending counts with breakdown
verified_requirements.athlete_grouping: PASS - grouped by athlete, sorted by interest priority
verified_requirements.dual_action_buttons: PASS - 'To Athlete' (violet) and 'To Pod' (blue) on each note
verified_requirements.send_to_athlete: PASS - creates support message + timeline entry + notification
verified_requirements.route_to_pod: PASS - routes note to school pod with actions
verified_requirements.complete_debrief: PASS - marks event as debriefed, shows badge
verified_requirements.support_message_created: PASS - verified 3 event_followup_athlete notifications in DB
